vision_audit_failed_the_file_may_be_to: Vision audit failed. The file may be too large or unsupported.
audit_failed_try_different_content_or_: Audit failed. Try different content or a simpler URL.
audit_failed_the_content_could_not_be_: Audit failed. The content could not be analyzed.
be_an_accessibility_change_agent_audit: Be an Accessibility Change Agent — Audit, Learn, Advocate
need_screen_readers_and_alt_text: Need screen readers and alt text
audit_paste_it_see_what_breaks: Audit — paste it, see what breaks
ai_runs_a_wcag_2_1_aa_pass_against_url: AI runs a WCAG 2.1 AA pass against URL / HTML / PDF / screenshot / social / gov input. Common findings: missing alt text (1.1.1), color contrast under 4.5:1 (1.4.3), keyboard traps (2.1.1), unlabeled inputs (3.3.2).
perceivable_operable_understandable_ro: Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust. Every WCAG criterion maps to one of these. Disability is a mismatch between body and environment, never a property of the person.
knowbility_austin_tx_est_1999_runs_ope: Knowbility (Austin TX, est. 1999) runs OpenAIR — the world’s longest-running accessibility hackathon — and trains pros via AccessU. They wrote much of the playbook every modern auditor uses.
you_don_t_need_a_lawyer_to_file_an_ada: You don’t need a lawyer to file an ADA Title II / III complaint. Department of Justice (ada.gov), Section 508 (section508.gov), and state AG offices all accept civilian complaints — and inaccessible gov sites are illegal.
past_audits_saved_here_so_you_can_trac: Past audits saved here so you can track which sites improved (or regressed) over time. Aggregate metrics let you make a sharable case to school IT or a vendor.
first_audit_5_audits_10_audits_critica: First Audit, 5 Audits, 10 Audits, Critical Issue Hunter, POUR Master, etc. Recognition for the unglamorous work of catching issues *before* they reach disabled users.
what_would_you_like_to_audit: What would you like to audit?
the_ai_will_analyze_the_website_s_acce: The AI will analyze the website’s accessibility based on its known structure and common patterns.
paste_any_html_code_from_a_school_proj: Paste any HTML code — from a school project, a webpage, or generated by a coding tool. The AI will check it for accessibility issues.
upload_a_pdf_document_to_check_its_acc: Upload a PDF document to check its accessibility
the_ai_will_check_for_tagged_structure: The AI will check for: tagged structure, reading order, alt text on images, form labels, color contrast, language declaration, and heading hierarchy.
upload_a_screenshot_of_a_website_app_o: Upload a screenshot of a website, app, or document
the_ai_will_visually_analyze_the_scree: The AI will visually analyze the screenshot for: color contrast issues, missing labels, layout problems, text readability, and visual accessibility barriers.
paste_the_post_text_include_hashtags_m: Paste the post text (include hashtags, mentions, and any image descriptions)
paste_the_full_post_text_here_include_:
Paste the full post text here...

Include:
• All text content
• Hashtags
• Image descriptions (if any)
• Link URLs
checks_alt_text_captions_camelcase_has: Checks: alt text, captions, CamelCase hashtags, emoji placement, readability, contrast, and text-in-images.
audit_government_and_school_websites_f: Audit government and school websites for ADA Title II compliance. Includes standard WCAG checks plus Title II-specific requirements.
checks_wcag_2_1_aa_ada_coordinator_inf: Checks WCAG 2.1 AA + ADA Coordinator info, accessibility statement, grievance procedure, PDF tagging, form accessibility, captions, and third-party tools.
checking_structure_images_contrast_key: Checking structure, images, contrast, keyboard access, and more
this_score_is_generated_by_an_ai_model: This score is generated by an AI model reasoning over what it can see — not an automated WCAG test. Verify real contrast ratios, keyboard order, and focus with tools like axe, WAVE, or Lighthouse.
alloflow_cannot_fetch_or_inspect_a_liv: AlloFlow cannot fetch or inspect a live site — these are AI guesses from training data, not verified findings. Do not claim compliance or file a complaint based on them without checking each one yourself.
core_criteria_click_any_to_learn_more: core criteria. Click any to learn more.
a_real_wcag_ratio_computed_in_your_bro: A REAL WCAG ratio computed in your browser from relative luminance — not an AI guess. Pick a text and a background color.
large_18pt_or_14pt_bold_this_is_the_ex: Large = 18pt+ (or 14pt+ bold). This is the exact math axe / WAVE / Lighthouse use.
press_tab_to_move_between_these_two_bu: Press Tab to move between these two buttons. One shows where keyboard focus is; the other hides it — a keyboard-only user would be lost.
creating_an_inclusive_digital_world_si: Creating an inclusive digital world since 1999
annual_hands_on_training_conference_hy: Annual hands-on training conference (hybrid). Named after Dr. John Slatin, it teaches practical skills in coding, usability, and inclusive design. Next session: May 11–14, 2026.
an_8_week_global_online_competition_pa: An 8-week global online competition pairing volunteer web professionals with nonprofits to build accessible websites. Started as a one-day hackathon and evolved into Knowbility’s signature program.
help_with_registration_room_hosting_an: Help with registration, room hosting, and support. Earn free conference access for a 4-8 hour shift.
developers_designers_and_content_creat: Developers, designers, and content creators build accessible websites for nonprofits.
attend_accessu_sessions_use_free_resou: Attend AccessU sessions, use free resources, and build your accessibility skills.
use_this_tool_to_audit_and_report_acce: Use THIS tool to audit and report accessibility barriers. Be a change agent in your community!
found_accessibility_barriers_generate_: Found accessibility barriers? Generate a formal complaint letter to request change. Choose your recipient:
e_g_portland_public_schools_city_of_au: e.g. Portland Public Schools, City of Austin
describe_the_impact_who_is_affected_an: Describe the impact (who is affected and how)
e_g_my_child_uses_a_screen_reader_and_: e.g. My child uses a screen reader and cannot navigate the enrollment forms...
contact_the_entity_s_ada_coordinator_f: Contact the entity’s ADA Coordinator first — they can often resolve issues quickly.
if_unresolved_file_with_the_doj_at_ada: If unresolved, file with the DOJ at ada.gov/file-a-complaint/
you_can_also_mail_u_s_doj_civil_rights: You can also mail: U.S. DOJ, Civil Rights Division, 950 Pennsylvania Ave NW, Washington DC 20530
no_audits_yet_run_your_first_audit_to_: No audits yet. Run your first audit to see results here.
